title: Alternative Penalty of Fines and Service of Penalty. In lieu of the penalty
content: 31 of suspension of license of the LMA, the alternative penalty of fine may be imposed as 32 prescribed under the DMW Adjudication Rules and Procedures and R.A. No. 12021 and 33 its IRR. 34 35 In case the penalty is fully served or the alternative penalty has been paid, a Lifting Order 36 shall be issued by the Department or its duly authorized representative. 37 38 39 Disciplinary Action against Principal/Employer 40 41
